# goBeauty.ai

> goBeauty.ai is an AI-native beauty discovery engine. Upload a photo of a look,
> describe a beauty goal, or search for a service — goBeauty tells you whether to
> DIY it, book a professional, or shop the right products, and shows the top options.
> Salon and spa owners can also discover professional products and suppliers
> through the Products for Salons marketplace (lead generation; no multi-supplier cart).

## What goBeauty.ai does

- AI photo analysis: upload a look (hair, nails, skin, makeup, lashes and brows,
  K-beauty, med spa) and get an actionable plan.
- Decision engine: for each look or goal, recommends DIY guides, bookable
  professionals, or products — with a "Top 3" for each path.
- Covers nails, hair, skin, makeup, lashes & brows, K-beauty, aftercare and med spa.
- Supplier marketplace for salon products: treatments, aftercare, retail, samples,
  equipment demos, and private label inquiries.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.gobeauty.ai/): browse looks and services by category.
- [Get This Look](https://www.gobeauty.ai/get-this-look): AI photo-analysis chat.
- [Products for Salons](https://www.gobeauty.ai/marketplace): professional product marketplace.
- [Suppliers](https://www.gobeauty.ai/marketplace/suppliers): beauty suppliers and brand profiles.
- [List Your Products](https://www.gobeauty.ai/brands/list-your-products): supplier listing form.

## Audience

Consumers deciding how to achieve a beauty look; beauty professionals and salon
owners looking for products to use and sell; and suppliers who want to reach
salon and spa buyers.
